name: Suspicious Process from Microsoft HTML Help
notes:
This is rule detects suspicious process spawned from Microsoft HTML Help.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Maxim Pavlunin, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: HTML Help HH.EXE Suspicious Child Process
SIGMA Description: Detects a suspicious child process of a Microsoft HTML Help (HH.exe)


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

when the event matches ( LOWER("Parent Process Full Full Name") == 'hh.exe' AND LOWER("Process Full Full Name") IN ('cmd.exe','powershell.exe','pwsh.exe','wscript.exe','cscript.exe','regsvr32.exe','wmic.exe','rundll32.exe','mshta.exe','certutil.exe','certreq.exe','msbuild.exe','installutil.exe','schtasks.exe','msiexec.exe') ) OR ( LOWER("Process Full Full Name") == 'hh.exe' AND ( LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.application%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\downloads\%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\content.outlook\%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\appdata\local\temp\%' ) ) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Process from Microsoft HTML Help on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

AND when the event matches ( 	LOWER("Parent Process Full Full Name") == 'hh.exe' 	AND  	LOWER("Process Full Full Name") IN ('cmd.exe','powershell.exe','pwsh.exe','wscript.exe','cscript.exe','regsvr32.exe','wmic.exe','rundll32.exe','mshta.exe','certutil.exe','certreq.exe','msbuild.exe','installutil.exe','schtasks.exe','msiexec.exe') ) OR ( 	LOWER("Process Full Full Name") == 'hh.exe' 	AND  	( 		LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.application%' 		OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\downloads\%' 		OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\content.outlook\%' 		OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\appdata\local\temp\%' 	) ) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Process from Microsoft HTML Help
Event description: Detects suspicious process spawned from Microsoft HTML Help.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
